nodes.name: Mentawai scops owl
nodes.summary: Mentawai scops owl（Otus mentawi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mentawai scops owl。

nodes.name: Otus
nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mentawai scops owl
nodes.summary: The Mentawai scops owl (Otus mentawi) is endemic to larger islands of Mentawai, off west Sumatra, Indonesia. References BirdLife.org Species Factsheet: Otus mentawi (Mentawai scops owl) Owl Pages.com: Mentawai scops owl
